name: Glu Mobile Inc.
description: Glu Mobile Inc. is a leading global developer and publisher of free-to-play mobile games. Founded in 2001 and headquartered in San Francisco, California, the company designs and markets a diverse portfolio of original and licensed intellectual properties, including titles such as Design Home, Covet Fashion, and MLB Tap Sports Baseball. Glu's games are available on various platforms, including iOS and Android. In April 2021, Glu Mobile was acquired by Electronic Arts (EA), becoming a wholly-owned subsidiary and integrating its mobile gaming expertise into EA's broader portfolio.
